parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Volume-backup policy name.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Initial policy state: 0 for disabled or 1 for enabled; default is 0.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Backup cycle type: day or week.

parameters.name: cycle_day
parameters.description: Backup interval in days; used only when cycle type is day.

parameters.name: cycle_week
parameters.description: Comma-separated weekdays from 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday) when the cycle type is week.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Comma-separated backup hours from 0 to 23.

parameters.name: retention_type
parameters.description: Retention type: num for count-based retention, date for time-based retention, or all to retain every backup.

parameters.name: retention_num
parameters.description: Retention count from 1 to 99999; used only when retention type is num.

parameters.name: retention_day
parameters.description: Retention period from 1 to 99999 days; used only when retention type is date.

parameters.name: remain_first_of_cur_month
parameters.description: Whether to retain each month's first backup; default is false and valid with count-based retention, except when the retention count is 1.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0.

parameters.name: full_backup_interval
parameters.description: Periodic full-backup interval from -1 to 100; default is -1, 0 makes every backup full, and a positive value makes one full backup after that many incremental backups.

parameters.name: adv_retention_status
parameters.description: Whether advanced retention is enabled; default is false.

parameters.name: adv_retention
parameters.description: Advanced retention-policy configuration used when advanced retention is enabled.

examples: ctyun vbs policy create --policy-name test-policy --cycle-type day --time 1,20 --retention-type num --cycle-day 1 --retention-num 1

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Volume-backup policy ID.

parameters.name: full_backup
parameters.description: Whether to create a full backup.

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: repository_name
parameters.description: Repository name containing 2-32 letters, digits, or hyphens; it cannot start with a digit or hyphen or end with a hyphen.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Repository capacity from 100 to 1024000 GB; default is 100 GB.

parameters.name: on_demand
parameters.description: Whether the repository uses on-demand billing; default is false. Cycle type and count are required when false.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: MONTH or YEAR; required when on-demand billing is false.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription duration, up to three years or 36 months; required when on-demand billing is false.

parameters.name: auto_renew_status
parameters.description: Automatic renewal state: 0 for disabled or 1 for enabled; default is 0 and applies only to subscriptions.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: JSON array of labels to bind to the repository.

examples: ctyun vbs repository create --client-token 4cf2962d-e92c-4c00-9181-cfbb2218636c --region 81f7728662dd11ec810800155d307d5b --repository-name test-repo --size 100 --cycle-type MONTH --cycle-count 6 --auto-renew-status 1
